reasoning: Today, we're laser-focused on addressing your lactate clearance limiter. Your last ride indicated solid aerobic conditioning but to excel on the Alpine Loop's main climb, we need to enhance your fatigue resistance and ability to clear lactate in high-intensity bursts. We're simulating that effort by revisiting Emigration Canyon, focusing on strategic over-unders.

suggested_sets.name: Main Set
suggested_sets.description: 4x10 minutes at over-unders: 6 mins at 201-218W, 4 mins at 242-256W; recover 3 mins at 50% FTP in between sets

weekly_focus: This week: progressive loading — keep attacking the lactate clearance gap.
